metadata.Plot: The film tells the stories of two stepbrothers who fall in love with the same woman. Isa (In English, Jesus) grows up with his brother, Musa (In English, Moses). Musa is in love with a woman named Meryem (In English, Mary) and wants to get married. But Musa escapes from the village because of a crime he has committed. Musa has to hide. Maryem and Isa get married. Years later Musa returns. Isa gets a fatal disease. Isa (Jesus), Musa (Moses), and Meryem (Mary) will face in a journey they have emerged. This movie is difficult to understand, this film does not contain any action, and it is very different from same films. It's a psychological film. Even if it's a boring film, it's watching for untouched Cappadocia scenes.
metadata.Actors: Tarik Akan, Meral Konrat, Oktay Sözbir
